moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon tennis championships conclude this week with the ladies' and gentlemen's singles finals, live from the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Finals Countdown
angles.copy: It's finals week at Wimbledon! Who are you backing for the Gentlemen's and Ladies' Singles titles this weekend? The tension is building on the grass courts.

angles.name: Quarter-Finals Day
angles.copy: Centre Court calls! Today sees the Quarter-Finals at Wimbledon. Who will make it through to the semis? Catch all the action from SW19.

moments.title: The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins its practice days from Sunday, July 12, with the main tournament running from July 16-19 at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, Merseyside.

angles.name: Practice Days Start
angles.copy: Golf's biggest names are heading to Royal Birkdale! Practice days for The Open Championship kick off this Sunday. Get ready for a week of world-class golf.

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Host
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is set to host The Open for the 11th time next week. Who's your pick to lift the Claret Jug on Merseyside?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Revealed
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart will be updated this Friday, July 10, revealing the biggest songs across the UK right now.

angles.name: Chart Prediction
angles.copy: Who's going to be number one this week? The new Official UK Singles Chart drops on Friday! What track are you hoping takes the top spot?

angles.name: Friday Chart Drop
angles.copy: Get ready for your Friday playlist update! The UK's Official Singles Chart is announced later this week. Which new tunes are you loving?

moments.title: 2000trees Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 2000trees Festival, a multi-award-winning rock and indie festival, begins today, July 8, and runs until July 11 in Gloucestershire.

angles.name: Festival Gates Open
angles.copy: Let the rock begin! 2000trees Festival opens its gates today in Gloucestershire. Who's heading down for an epic weekend of live music?

angles.name: Indie & Rock Live
angles.copy: If you're into indie and rock, 2000trees is where it's at! Four days of incredible bands and festival vibes. What acts are you buzzing to see?

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival in London
moments.blurb: London's Kaleidoscope Festival returns to Alexandra Palace Park this Saturday, July 11, featuring a diverse lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Ally Pally Calling
angles.copy: This Saturday, Alexandra Palace Park hosts Kaleidoscope Festival! Live music, comedy, and incredible views across London. Who's got tickets?

angles.name: Weekend Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Looking for weekend plans? Kaleidoscope Festival is bringing the good times to London this Saturday with a stacked line-up!

moments.title: Lost Minds Festival in Newcastle
moments.blurb: Lost Minds Festival, a major dance music event, takes over Newcastle this Saturday, July 11, promising a day of electronic acts and high energy.

angles.name: Newcastle Dance Party
angles.copy: Newcastle, are you ready to lose your minds? Lost Minds Festival hits the city this Saturday with a huge line-up of dance acts!

angles.name: Electronic Music Weekend
angles.copy: This Saturday is all about the beats! Lost Minds Festival brings the best in electronic music to Newcastle. Get ready to rave!

moments.title: Also Festival in Warwickshire
moments.blurb: Also Festival, an immersive weekend of ideas, music, food, and nature, takes place from July 10-12 in Warwickshire.

angles.name: Weekend of Ideas
angles.copy: Escape to the beautiful Warwickshire countryside this weekend for Also Festival! Three days of music, talks, workshops, and delicious food.

angles.name: Culture & Nature
angles.copy: More than just music! Also Festival combines nature, ideas, and unique performances for a truly different festival experience starting Friday.

moments.title: Boogietown Festival in London
moments.blurb: Boogietown Festival brings a day of disco, funk, and house music to London this Saturday, July 11.

angles.name: Groove into the Weekend
angles.copy: London, get ready to boogie! Boogietown Festival is this Saturday, bringing disco, funk, and house vibes to the capital.

angles.name: Disco & House Party
angles.copy: Your weekend soundtrack sorted! Boogietown Festival on Saturday is serving up the best in disco and house. Who's joining the party?

moments.title: Henley Festival of Music & Arts
moments.blurb: The Henley Festival, a boutique music and arts event, runs from July 10-14 in Henley-on-Thames, offering a unique 'black tie' experience by the river.

angles.name: Glamour by the River
angles.copy: Dress to impress! Henley Festival kicks off this Friday, bringing five nights of music, comedy, and dining to the banks of the Thames.

angles.name: Boutique Festival Experience
angles.copy: Looking for a touch of class this weekend? Henley Festival offers a stunning, sophisticated arts and music experience.

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival
moments.blurb: Birmingham's Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival brings three days of incredible grooves and rhythms to Moseley Park from July 10-12.

angles.name: Birmingham Grooves
angles.copy: Get ready to move! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival starts this Friday in Birmingham. Three days of pure musical bliss!

angles.name: Feel Good Festival
angles.copy: Moseley Park is about to get soulful! Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival is the perfect weekend soundtrack.

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival, celebrating traditional and contemporary Celtic music, takes place from July 15-18 in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides.

angles.name: Island Sounds
angles.copy: Next week, the Hebridean Celtic Festival brings a fantastic lineup of music to the Outer Hebrides! Who's making the trip to Stornoway?

angles.name: Celtic Culture
angles.copy: Celebrate Celtic music and culture at the Hebridean Celtic Festival, starting next Wednesday! A unique festival experience.

moments.title: Jaden Smith Turns 28
moments.blurb: American rapper, singer, and actor Jaden Smith, known for his unique style and roles in films like 'The Karate Kid,' celebrates his 28th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy 28th Jaden
angles.copy: Happy 28th Birthday to the multi-talented Jaden Smith! From acting alongside his dad to dropping unique tracks, he's always pushing boundaries.

angles.name: Music & Movies
angles.copy: Wishing Jaden Smith a very happy 28th birthday today! What's your favourite Jaden Smith movie or track?

moments.title: Suzanne Vega Turns 67
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', celebrates her 67th birthday this Saturday, July 11.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Suzanne
angles.copy: This Saturday, we're wishing a very Happy 67th Birthday to the iconic Suzanne Vega! 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner' are still classics.

angles.name: Folk-Pop Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Suzanne Vega, who turns 67 on Saturday! Her folk-inspired music has left a lasting legacy.

moments.title: Luke Hemmings Turns 30
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead vocalist and guitarist of the pop-rock band 5 Seconds of Summer, celebrates his 30th birthday on Tuesday, July 16.

angles.name: Happy 30th Luke
angles.copy: Big birthday coming up! Luke Hemmings of 5 Seconds of Summer turns 30 next Tuesday! What's your favourite 5SOS track?

angles.name: 5SOS Frontman
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 30th birthday to 5SOS frontman Luke Hemmings next week! Celebrate with us by streaming your favourite hits!
